title: salix × charrieri
intro: Salix × charrieri, also known as Charrier's willow, is a hybrid plant derived from the cross between Salix fragilis and Salix alba. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating inflammation and pain, due to its content of salicylic acid, a compound similar to aspirin. The health benefits of Salix × charrieri include reducing fever, alleviating rheumatic pain, and soothing skin irritations. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or salve, which are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
